case_title: GALBISO, MARY VS MBATIAH, MARY TIFFANY C/O EVANS RESEARCH

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-02-1996, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY GALBISO, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT MBATIAH, MARY TIFFANY C/O EVANS RESEARCH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MBATIAH, MARY TIFFANY C/O EVANS RESEARCH
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALBISO, MARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MBATIAH, MARY TIFFANY C/O EVANS RESEARCH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALBISO, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MBATIAH, MARY TIFFANY C/O EVANS RESEARCH $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,540.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
